visualizations.title: Mathematical Definition of Percent
visualizations.description: The general algebraic representation of a percentage as a fraction out of 100.

steps.explanation: Any number 'x' followed by the percent symbol.
Is equivalent to that number divided by 100.

visualizations.title: 100-Grid Percentage Model
visualizations.description: Watch the 10x10 grid fill up to see how percentages represent portions of 100.
